title: HARE
description:
HARE – A Casual RPG & Realism Modpack (Fabric 1.19.2)
Update!
body:
HARE is a lightweight, casual RPG-style modpack focused on immersive survival, soft realism, and exploration. Featuring smooth combat, origins, thirst, seasonal changes, better sounds, and tons of ambience – it’s perfect for players who want a chill, semi-realistic adventure without heavy grinding or complex systems.

⚔️ Better Combat & Simply Swords – more dynamic and beautiful fights

🧬 Origins & PlayerEx – unique character traits and progression

🌳 Ecologics, Naturalist & Falling Leaves – enhanced world generation and nature

🌦️ Fabric Seasons & Sound Physics Remastered – deeper immersion

💧 It’s Thirst – light survival mechanics

🌌 Explorify & Mythic Metals – exploration and rare materials

Designed for both solo play and multiplayer. Built with performance in mind (Sodium, Lithium, Phosphor, etc.).
